name: the declared stack is persisted in the profile and grounds its namespace when its probe is answered
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/full-surface-intake.sh" --workload "a credentialing platform" --answers p.json --stack-add aws --probe-answer aws:aws_region_strategy=multi-region --partial --out prof.json --now 2026-07-05T00:00:00Z >/dev/null 2>&1; ruby -rjson -e 'p=JSON.parse(File.read("prof.json")); exit(p["stack"]==["aws"] && p["grounded_in_namespaces"].include?("aws") ? 0:1)' && echo stack-persisted-grounded 1>&2
